gazette: Official Gazette dated 08 June 2024 and numbered 32570
title: Türkiye imposes additional tariff for China origin cars
bodyHtml:
Türkiye on Saturday announced plans to introduce additional customs duties on Chinese-made internal combustion /diesel engines and hybrid cars.

 the Decision on the Application of Additional Customs Duty in Importation has been amended accordingly.

According to the footnote added to tariff heading 8703 ,  for imports originating from the People's Republic of China, the additional customs duty will be applied as "40% or a minimum of 7,000 USD/unit, whichever is higher."

The calculated additional customs duty cannot be lower than 7,000 USD per unit. If it is lower, the tax will be calculated as 7,000 USD per unit instead of the calculated tax.

The amendment will come into effect on 8 July 2024.

Click here for the Decision on Amendment to the Decision on the Application of Additional Customs Duty in Importation (Decision Number: 8639).
